creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mi          2011-07-11 04:35:49 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases/pgtcl      Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Upgrade from 1.8.0 to 1.9.0 released in March. The newly added feature
  can only be used with Tcl85 and above, but the software still builds
  with earlier Tcl.
  
  PR:     158742
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +5 -3      ports/databases/pgtcl/Makefile
  1.4       +4 -4      ports/databases/pgtcl/distinfo
  1.3       +0 -1      ports/databases/pgtcl/pkg-plist
